tools.name: start_dca
tools.description: Configure a new dollar-cost averaging strategy. Opens the MetaMask delegation grant modal and stores the strategy once the owner signs.

amount_usdc.description: USDC amount per execution in human-readable form, e.g. '10' for 10 USDC.

frequency.description: How often to execute the swap.

chain_id.description: Chain to execute on. 84532 = Base Sepolia (default), 8453 = Base Mainnet (requires extra confirmation).

tools.name: list_dca_strategies
tools.description: List the owner's active DCA strategies.

agent_id.description: Agent ID to query strategies for.

tools.name: stop_dca
tools.description: Cancel an active DCA strategy by ID.

strategy_id.description: UUID of the strategy to cancel.
